emails.subject: EES Files
emails.body: EES Files Chris, I have EES and PGES files prepared though March, if there is someone at EES you would like me to send them to, please let me know. Thanks. -Kit

emails.subject: RE: EES Files
emails.body: RE: EES Files Check with Caroline to see who the current contact is with EES.

emails.subject: RE: EES Files
emails.body: Chris, I did ask Caroline, she told me to ask you, we were both under the impression that it had changed and that you had someone new that we were to send it to. I will keep sending them to the old contacts. -Kit

emails.subject: RE: EES Files
emails.body: I have down: Jennifer Johnson, Pamela Carter, and Jeff McClellan. Do those people sound right to you?
